negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_152
prompt: The video opens with a first-person perspective from a camera mounted on a robotic unit, showcasing two robotic hands positioned at either end of a light wooden table. Between them lies a fully solved Rubik's cube resting on a dark, textured shelf. The background reveals a cluttered workshop or lab space with various pieces of equipment, including a humanoid robot figure, several chairs, and several desks with computer monitors. A person stands in the middle ground, observing the scene. The robotic arm on the right extends its fingers towards the Rubik's cube, closing in on it, while the left arm remains stationary. By the final frame, the robotic hand has made contact with the cube, with the fingers slightly curled, and lifts the cube, placing it on a higher level of the dark, textured shelf. The scene maintains focus on the interaction between the robotic arms and the Rubik's cube, emphasizing the precision and control of the robotic movements within this busy laboratory setting.
